name: Clockwork & Jane the Killer
description:
BONUS Chapter: Shut up already

Jane thought you both were safe and finally could relax after the chaotic night.

No.

No, Clockwork had to barge in thinking poor you were alone.

Jane was keeping calm before she kicked Clockwork’s annoying ass out.

[ASYLUM AU]

(Clockwork is being bad, you better help her or else Jane will probably kick her ass + and finally we’re getting out of that damn forest area)

LLMS HAVE ISSUES!!!

I cannot fix things like:

Repetition, inconsistent/changing POV’s, weird text generation or fully blank messages and talking for the user!
creator: Nikushxmi
